languages.text: This creature is so old that its Armor and Dodge are decreased by 40%.

languages.text: Эта машина настолько стара, что едва способна двигаться. Ее броня и уклонение снижены на 40%.

Эта машина настолько стара, что едва способна двигаться. Ее броня и уклонение снижены на 40%.

languages.text: Cette machine est si vieille qu'elle peut à peine bouger. Son Armure et son Esquive sont réduites de −40 %.
languages.original_text: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.

traits.locale_text: Cette machine est si vieille qu'elle peut à peine bouger. Son Armure et son Esquive sont réduites de −40 %.

languages.text: Bu makine öyle eski ki güçlükle hareket edebiliyor. Zırh ve kaçınma değerleri %40 azalır.
languages.original_text: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.

traits.locale_text: Bu makine öyle eski ki güçlükle hareket edebiliyor. Zırh ve kaçınma değerleri %40 azalır.

languages.text: 这台机器是如此古老，几乎无法移动。其护甲和闪避降低40%。
languages.original_text: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.

traits.locale_text: 这台机器是如此古老，几乎无法移动。其护甲和闪避降低40%。

languages.text: Esta máquina es tan antigua que apenas puede moverse. Su armadura y esquiva se reducen un −40 %.
languages.original_text: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.

traits.locale_text: Esta máquina es tan antigua que apenas puede moverse. Su armadura y esquiva se reducen un −40 %.

languages.text: Diese Maschine ist so alt, dass sie sich kaum bewegen kann. Rüstungs- und Ausweichwert wird um –40 % reduziert.
languages.original_text: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.

traits.locale_text: Diese Maschine ist so alt, dass sie sich kaum bewegen kann. Rüstungs- und Ausweichwert wird um –40 % reduziert.

languages.text: この機械は非常に古く、ほとんど動けない。装甲と回避が40%低下する。
